person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Thomas Prence (c. 1601 – March 29, 1673) was a New England colonist who arrived in the colony of Plymouth in November 1621 on the ship Fortune. In 1644 he moved to Eastham, which he helped found, returning later to Plymouth. For many years, he was prominent in Plymouth colony affairs and was colony governor for about twenty years, covering three terms.

In England
Thomas Prence was probably born in the area of Lechlade, a town in Gloucestershire, in about 1600 to Thomas Prince and Elizabeth Tolderby. The Prince family moved to the London parish of All Hallows Barking, near Tower Hill, where Thomas' father was a carriage maker. Prence's father, in his will of July 31, 1639, mentioned "my son Thomas Prence now remayninge in New England in parts beyond the seas", and bequeathed him a "seale Ringe of Gold", indicating the family may have been armigerous.  Prence's ancestors spelled the family name "Prince", but, after his emigration, Thomas used the spelling of "Prence".

Prence lived in Ratcliff, at that time a hamlet in the parish of Stepney, which is where he was probably living when he decided to emigrate to the New World

He came to America on the ship "Fortune" in 1621, and he served as the fourth Governor of Plymouth Colony from 1634 to 1635, then from 1638 to 1639, and again from 1657 until his death in 1673.

Bio by: Deena
Family from wikipedia:
Thomas Prence married 4 times. 
He married his first wife, Patience, on August 5, 1624. She was the daughter of William Brewster. They had four children before she died of a "pestilent fever" in 1634. 
The children were: 
1. Rebecca, 
2. Thomas, 
3. Hannah and 
4. Mercy.

He next married Mary Collier, daughter of William Collier, on April 1, 1635. 
They had at least two children before her death, circa 1644. Their names were 
5. Jane and 
6. Mary.

His third wife was Apphia (Quicke) Freeman, whom he married sometime between 1644 and the 1660s.The couple had a daughter:
 7. Judith Prence born May 1645, AGBI[36]

Sometime in the 1660s (before either 1662 or 1668)[36] Prence married for the fourth and final time. His wife was Mary, widow of Thomas Howes. 

He had three more children:  but it is not certain which wife was the mother - 
 8. Elizabeth and 
 9. Sarah 
 


He was one of the appraisers of Gov. William Brewster's 
estate. He came to New England in the ship Fortune in 1621, 
being then in his 22nd year. He was chosen Governor in 1634, 
and again in 1638. In 1657 he was living at Eastham and was 
chosen Governor. The law required that the Governor should 
Uve at Plymouth, but the court granted a dispensation and he 
continued, while holding office, to reside in Eastham. In 1665 
he removed to Plymouth, where he resided until his death. His 
salary as Governor was £50 a year. He left seven daughters, 
all of whom married. His marriage to Patience Brewster was the 
ninth in the colony, the first being that on May 12, 1621, between 
Edward Winslow, of the Mayflower, and Susanna (Jackson) White.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Prence於1600年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯時，他的父親Thomas Prence Sr.26歲，母親Elizabeth Ann Todlerby23歲。他於1624年8月5日與Patience Brewster在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1627年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼且於1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利。他於1657年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼被列為12th governor of plymouth colony。他去世於1673年3月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年73歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Prence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the patronymic ap Rhys, also spelled ap Res ‘son of Rhys’. Preece is interchangeable with Price , the more common pronunciation of the name.

habitational name either from Prees in Shropshire or Preese in Lancashire. Both placenames derive from Proto-Welsh prês ‘brushwood, copse, grove’ (Welsh prys). Confusion between this name and 1 is likely.

variants.name: Price
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Rhys ‘son of Rhys’ (see Reece ). This is one of the commonest of Welsh surnames. It has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
English: nickname from Middle English, Old French pris ‘excellent, noble, highly valued (person)’.
Americanized form of Jewish   Preuss   or   Preis  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Prence was born in 1600, in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas Prence Sr., was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann Todlerby, was 23. He married Patience Brewster on 5 August 1624, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He lived in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1627 and Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. In 1657, his occupation is listed as 12th governor of plymouth colony in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 29 March 1673, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Prence est né en 1600, à Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Prence Sr., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann Todlerby, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Patience Brewster le 5 août 1624, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1627 et à Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. En 1657, sa profession de son indiquée est 12th governor of plymouth colony à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1673, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Prence 1600 in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Prence Sr. 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ann Todlerby 23. Er hat am 5. August 1624 in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Patience Brewster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1627 hat er in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und 1635 in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1657 ist sein Beruf als 12th governor of plymouth colony in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. März 1673 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Prence è nato il nel 1600 nel Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Prence Sr., aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Ann Todlerby, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Patience Brewster il 5 agosto 1624, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1627 e nel Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Nel 1657, la sua occupazione è indicata come 12th governor of plymouth colony nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 29 marzo 1673, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Prenceが1600年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父Thomas Prence Sr.は26歳，母Elizabeth Ann Todlerbyは23歳であった。1624年8月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーでPatience Brewsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1627年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに，1635年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーダクスブリーに住んでいた。1657年，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーでの職業は12th governor of plymouth colonyと記録されている。彼は1673年3月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスプリモウスで73歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスプリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Prence(이)가 1600년 영국 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Prence Sr.(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann Todlerby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1624년 8월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 Patience Brewster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1627년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서, 1635년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 드스버이에서 살았다. 1657년, 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 12th governor of plymouth colony이었다. 그는 1673년 3월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 플림우스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Prence nasceu em 1600, em Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Prence Sr., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ann Todlerby, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Patience Brewster em 5 de agosto de 1624, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1627 e em Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Em 1657, sua profissão aparece como 12th governor of plymouth colony em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1673, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Prence родился в 1600 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Prence Sr. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann Todlerby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Patience Brewster 5 августа 1624 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1627 году и в местности дуксбури, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. В 1657 году он работал по профессии 12th governor of plymouth colony в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 29 марта 1673 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности плимоут, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Prence nació en 1600, en Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Prence Sr., tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ann Todlerby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Patience Brewster el 5 de agosto de 1624, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Vivió en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1627 y en Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. En 1657, su ocupación registrada era 12th governor of plymouth colony en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1673, en Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
